subparts.text: Find out the output of the following C++ code: #include<iostream> using namespace std; int main { int a=18, b=9, c,d, e=10; c=b++; d=b; cout << ; cout << ; cout << ; cout << ; return 0; } Justify your answer.
Differentiate between C and C++ programming language.

Consider the following C++ code: #include<iostream> class Test { public: Test { cout<<”Constructor called
”; } ~Test { cout<<”Destructor called
”; } void display { cout<<”Display function
”; } }; Int main { Test t1; t1.display; return 0; } Write the output of the program with explanation.
What is the use of private and public access specifier? Explain with one suitable programming example.
What are the different characteristics of Object-Oriented Programming? Discuss any two characteristics with programming example. 5
Write a C++ program to print a factorial of a given number. 5
What is inline function? What circumstances lead to its frequent usage in programming? Provide an appropriate C++ programming code to illustrate. 5

Write a C++ Program to Implement a Class STUDENT having Following Members: 1) Member variables: Name of the student, Marks of the student , Total marks obtained 2) Member functions: assign – to assign initial values, compute – to compute Total marks, display – to display the details Consider the access specifier and data types of the variables as per your convenience to justify the output of the program. 5
Explain the use of friend function in OOP with proper programming example. 5
Write the operator overloading program with C++ to overload unary decrement operator. 5
